With.Name: Main
With.Cte: SELECT {{ Fields -Dimension: PointsOfSale --Table: PointsOfSaleCte -Dimension: Products --Table: ProductsCte -WithComma }} {{ IfRequest -Expression: MinimumMultiple --MIN(ReplenishmentReport.MinimumMultiple) AS MinimumMultiple -Expression: OriginalOrder --SUM(ReplenishmentReport.OriginalOrder) AS OriginalOrder -Expression: OriginalOrderCost --SUM(ReplenishmentReport.OriginalOrderCost) AS OriginalOrderCost -Expression: Orders --SUM(ReplenishmentReport.Orders) AS Orders -Expression: OrderCost --SUM(ReplenishmentReport.OrderCost) AS OrderCost -Expression: ImminentRupture --SUM(ReplenishmentReport.ImminentRupture) AS ImminentRupture -Expression: SalesTwoMonths --SUM(ReplenishmentReport.SalesTwoMonths) AS SalesTwoMonths -Expression: SalesSixMonths --SUM(ReplenishmentReport.SalesSixMonths) AS SalesSixMonths -Expression: SalesProjection --SUM(ReplenishmentReport.SalesProjection) AS SalesProjection -Expression: ActualStock --SUM(ReplenishmentReport.ActualStock) AS ActualStock -Expression: WarehouseStock --/* --SUM(CASE WHEN ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ReplenishmentReport.ProductId ORDER BY ReplenishmentReport.ProductId) = 1 -- THEN ReplenishmentReport.WarehouseStock -- ELSE 0 -- END) AS WarehouseStock --*/ --0 AS WarehouseStock -Expression: PendingReceptions --SUM(ReplenishmentReport.PendingReceptions) AS PendingReceptions -Expression: IdealWindow --SUM(ReplenishmentReport.IdealWindow) AS IdealWindow -Expression: RealWindow --SUM(ReplenishmentReport.RealWindow) AS RealWindow -Expression: AvailableStock --SUM(ReplenishmentReport.AvailableStock) AS AvailableStock -Expression: StockCost --SUM(ReplenishmentReport.StockCost) AS StockCost -Expression: Overstock --SUM(ReplenishmentReport.Overstock) AS Overstock -Expression: MissingStock --SUM(ReplenishmentReport.MissingStock) AS MissingStock -Expression: TransferIn --SUM(ReplenishmentReport.TransferIn) AS TransferIn -Expression: TransferOut --SUM(ReplenishmentReport.TransferOut) AS TransferOut -Expression: Returns --SUM(ReplenishmentReport.Returns) AS Returns -Expression: PromotionValue --MIN(ReplenishmentReport.PromotionValue) AS PromotionValue -Expression: ForcedWindows --SUM(CAST(ReplenishmentReport.ForcedWindows AS bigint)) AS ForcedWindows -Expression: ForcedProductive --SUM(ReplenishmentReport.ForcedProductive) AS ForcedProductive -Expression: LastDayOfSale --MAX(ReplenishmentReport.LastDayOfSale) AS LastDayOfSale -Expression: LastMonthSales --SUM(ReplenishmentReport.LastMonthSales) AS LastMonthSales -Expression: SalesTwoMonthsOutlier --SUM(ReplenishmentReport.SalesTwoMonthsOutlier) AS SalesTwoMonthsOutlier -Expression: SalesSixMonthsOutlier --SUM(ReplenishmentReport.SalesSixMonthsOutlier) AS SalesSixMonthsOutlier -Expression: RuptureTwoMonths --SUM(ReplenishmentReport.RuptureTwoMonths) AS RuptureTwoMonths -Expression: RuptureSixMonths --SUM(ReplenishmentReport.RuptureSixMonths) AS RuptureSixMonths -Expression: GlobalBlocks --MAX(CASE WHEN ReplenishmentReport.GlobalBlocks = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS GlobalBlocks -Expression: SalesIndirect2Months --SUM(ReplenishmentReport.SalesIndirect2Months) AS SalesIndirect2Months -Expression: SalesIndirect6Months --SUM(ReplenishmentReport.SalesIndirect6Months) AS SalesIndirect6Months -Expression: OmnichannelIdealStock --SUM(ReplenishmentReport.OmnichannelIdealStock) AS OmnichannelIdealStock }} FROM Fact.ReplenishmentReport {{ InnerJoin -Dimension: PointsOfSale --Table: PointsOfSaleCte -Table: ReplenishmentReport -On:PointOfSaleId-PointOfSaleId }} {{ InnerJoin -Dimension: Products --Table: ProductsCte -Table: ReplenishmentReport -On: ProductId-ProductId }} {{ GroupBy -Dimension: PointsOfSale --Table: PointsOfSaleCte -Dimension: Products --Table: ProductsCte }}
With.Query: SELECT {{ Fields -Dimension: PointsOfSale -Dimension: Products -WithComma }} {{ IfRequest -Expression: MinimumMultiple --MinimumMultiple -Expression: OriginalOrder --OriginalOrder -Expression: OriginalOrderCost --OriginalOrderCost -Expression: Orders --Orders -Expression: OrderCost --OrderCost -Expression: ImminentRupture --ImminentRupture -Expression: SalesTwoMonths --SalesTwoMonths -Expression: SalesSixMonths --SalesSixMonths -Expression: SalesProjection --SalesProjection -Expression: ActualStock --ActualStock -Expression: WarehouseStock --WarehouseStock -Expression: PendingReceptions --PendingReceptions -Expression: IdealWindow --IdealWindow -Expression: RealWindow --RealWindow -Expression: AvailableStock --AvailableStock -Expression: StockCost --StockCost -Expression: Overstock --Overstock -Expression: MissingStock --MissingStock -Expression: TransferIn --TransferIn -Expression: TransferOut --TransferOut -Expression: Returns --Returns -Expression: PromotionValue --PromotionValue -Expression: ForcedWindows --ForcedWindows -Expression: ForcedProductive --ForcedProductive -Expression: LastDayOfSale --LastDayOfSale -Expression: LastMonthSales --LastMonthSales -Expression: SalesTwoMonthsOutlier --SalesTwoMonthsOutlier -Expression: SalesSixMonthsOutlier --SalesSixMonthsOutlier -Expression: RuptureTwoMonths --RuptureTwoMonths -Expression: RuptureSixMonths --RuptureSixMonths -Expression: GlobalBlocks --GlobalBlocks -Expression: SalesIndirect2Months --SalesIndirect2Months -Expression: SalesIndirect6Months --SalesIndirect6Months -Expression: OmnichannelIdealStock --OmnichannelIdealStock -WhenRequestTotals --Default ---COUNT(*) OVER () AS TotalCount --Expression: MinimumMultiple ---MIN(MinimumMultiple) OVER() AS TotalMinimumMultiple --Expression: OriginalOrder ---SUM(OriginalOrder) OVER() AS TotalOriginalOrder --Expression: OriginalOrderCost ---SUM(OriginalOrderCost) OVER() AS TotalOriginalOrderCost --Expression: Orders ---SUM(Orders) OVER() AS TotalOrders --Expression: OrderCost ---SUM(OrderCost) OVER() AS TotalOrderCost --Expression: ImminentRupture ---SUM(ImminentRupture) OVER() AS TotalImminentRupture --Expression: SalesTwoMonths ---SUM(SalesTwoMonths) OVER() AS TotalSalesTwoMonths --Expression: SalesSixMonths ---SUM(SalesSixMonths) OVER() AS TotalSalesSixMonths --Expression: SalesProjection ---SUM(SalesProjection) OVER() AS TotalSalesProjection --Expression: ActualStock ---SUM(ActualStock) OVER() AS TotalActualStock --Expression: WarehouseStock ---SUM(WarehouseStock) OVER() AS TotalWarehouseStock --Expression: PendingReceptions ---SUM(PendingReceptions) OVER() AS TotalPendingReceptions --Expression: IdealWindow ---SUM(IdealWindow) OVER() AS TotalIdealWindow --Expression: RealWindow ---SUM(RealWindow) OVER() AS TotalRealWindow --Expression: AvailableStock ---SUM(AvailableStock) OVER() AS TotalAvailableStock --Expression: StockCost ---SUM(StockCost) OVER() AS TotalStockCost --Expression: Overstock ---SUM(Overstock) OVER() AS TotalOverstock --Expression: MissingStock ---SUM(MissingStock) OVER() AS TotalMissingStock --Expression: TransferIn ---SUM(TransferIn) OVER() AS TotalTransferIn --Expression: TransferOut ---SUM(TransferOut) OVER() AS TotalTransferOut --Expression: Returns ---SUM(Returns) OVER() AS TotalReturns --Expression: PromotionValue ---SUM(PromotionValue) OVER() AS TotalPromotionValue --Expression: ForcedWindows ---SUM(ForcedWindows) OVER() AS TotalForcedWindows --Expression: ForcedProductive ---SUM(ForcedProductive) OVER() AS TotalForcedProductive --Expression: LastDayOfSale ---MAX(LastDayOfSale) OVER() AS TotalLastDayOfSale --Expression: LastMonthSales ---SUM(LastMonthSales) OVER() AS TotalLastMonthSales --Expression: SalesTwoMonthsOutlier ---SUM(SalesTwoMonthsOutlier) OVER() AS TotalSalesTwoMonthsOutlier --Expression: SalesSixMonthsOutlier ---SUM(SalesSixMonthsOutlier) OVER() AS TotalSalesSixMonthsOutlier --Expression: RuptureTwoMonths ---SUM(RuptureTwoMonths) OVER() AS TotalRuptureTwoMonths --Expression: RuptureSixMonths ---SUM(RuptureSixMonths) OVER() AS TotalRuptureSixMonths --Expression: GlobalBlocks ---SUM(GlobalBlocks) OVER() AS TotalGlobalBlocks --Expression: SalesIndirect2Months ---SUM(SalesIndirect2Months) OVER() AS TotalSalesIndirect2Months --Expression: SalesIndirect6Months ---SUM(SalesIndirect6Months) OVER() AS TotalSalesIndirect6Months --Expression: OmnichannelIdealStock ---SUM(OmnichannelIdealStock) OVER() AS TotalOmnichannelIdealStock }} FROM GroupedCte {{ OrderBy -Dimension: PointsOfSale -Dimension: Products }} {{Pagination}}
